allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, Length; "---NET TEST---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 15\).StatusCode } catch { "NO NETWORK: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/aourednik/historical-basemaps/contents/geojson" -Headers @{ "User-Agent"="claude" } -TimeoutSec 30\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty name } catch { "ERR list: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
